compressed_prompt: Create a table with a 7 day trip itinerary for India, and a 7 day trip itinerary for China. Separate them with exactly 6 asterisks symbols: *******
response:
**India 7-Day Trip Itinerary: The Golden Triangle & Ranthambore**

| Day | City/Region | Highlights & Activities |
| :--- | :--- | :--- |
| **1** | **Delhi (Arrival)** | Arrive in Delhi. Visit Humayun's Tomb, Qutub Minar. Evening light and sound show at Red Fort. |
| **2** | **Delhi** | Morning at Raj Ghat. Explore Jama Masjid, Chandni Chowk market. Afternoon at India Gate & Rashtrapati Bhavan exterior. |
| **3** | **Agra** | Drive/train to Agra. Visit the iconic Taj Mahal at sunrise. Explore Agra Fort and Mehtab Bagh. |
| **4** | **Ranthambore** | Travel to Ranthambore. Afternoon safari in Ranthambore National Park (tiger spotting). |
| **5** | **Jaipur** | Morning safari. Drive to Jaipur. Visit Hawa Mahal and explore local markets in the evening. |
| **6** | **Jaipur** | Morning visit to Amber Fort (elephant ride optional). See Jantar Mantar and City Palace. |
| **7** | **Jaipur to Delhi (Departure)** | Visit Jal Mahal (Water Palace). Return to Delhi for departure flight. |

*******

**China 7-Day Trip Itinerary: Classic Highlights**

| Day | City/Region | Highlights & Activities |
| :--- | :--- | :--- |
| **1** | **Beijing (Arrival)** | Arrive in Beijing. Visit Tiananmen Square, explore the hutongs (traditional alleys) near Houhai. |
| **2** | **Beijing** | Full day at the Mutianyu section of the Great Wall (less crowded). Evening Peking Duck dinner. |
| **3** | **Beijing** | Morning at the Forbidden City. Afternoon at the Temple of Heaven. Enjoy a Chinese acrobatics show. |
| **4** | **Xi'an** | Fly/take high-speed train to Xi'an. Visit the ancient City Walls and Bell Tower. Explore Muslim Quarter. |
| **5** | **Xi'an** | Full day for the Terracotta Warriors Museum. See the Big Wild Goose Pagoda and fountain show. |
| **6** | **Shanghai** | Fly/take high-speed train to Shanghai. Visit the Yu Garden & Bazaar. Walk along the Bund. |
| **7** | **Shanghai (Departure)** | Visit the Shanghai Museum or Tianzifang arts district. Ascend Shanghai Tower for views. Departure from Pudong Airport. |
